summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VetGlobal B2B marketplace MVP. Backend APIs mostly functional (92.3% success rate), frontend UI working well except for critical catalog page bug. Authentication, cart, dashboards, and language switching all working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Order creation returns 422 validation error - expects 'order_data' parameter but receives direct JSON

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime error: Select.Item components cannot have empty string values
ui_bugs.selector: Catalog page completely broken - shows error screen
ui_bugs.error_details: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string. This is because the Select value can be set to an empty string to clear the selection and show the placeholder.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access catalog page due to Select component error

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, and promotions
Cart page displays empty state correctly
Buyer dashboard loads with VetPoints, orders statistics
Backend APIs: categories, products, auth, users, VetPoints
Admin login and seller registration working

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (critical catalog page broken, other pages working)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component in catalog page - remove empty string values from Select.Item components in category/stock filters. This is blocking the entire product browsing functionality. Also investigate order creation API parameter structure mismatch.
